description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this black laptop backpack from fastrack. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it is sure to accommodate everything you think of, while you strut around looking super cool! Height: 44 cm Width: 31 cm Depth at base: 16 cm Made of nylon for enhanced durability Roomy zippered inner compartment with a laptop compartment and a velcro closure to keep the laptop in place A small zippered pocket on the front to stow away essentials Brand tab appliqué d on the side Brand name and logo on the front Haul loop and soft handle for handling ease Two mesh pockets on the sides to hold bottles Padded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Cushioned panels on the back for added comfort Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
